calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Continued To Nov-30-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production And Evidence
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Quinton B. Cutlip, Esq. CUTLIP LAW OFFICE, PC (415) 265-7785 cutliplawoffice@gmail.com
Attorney for Plaintiff MARY RILEY
Andrew K. Murphy, Esq., CLAPP, MORONEY, VUCINICH, BEEMAN+SCHELEY (925) 734-0990 amurphy@clappmoroney.com Attorney for Defendant VANESSA LOUISE GETTY (Via ZOOM)

Defendant contest the amount of sanctions ordered. Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARY RILEY Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production And Evidence

Plaintiff Mary Riley moves to compel documents and further responses to specified requests for production and for sanctions from defendant Vanessa Getty. The motion is granted in part.

(see word minutes for complete ruling)

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions And The Corresponding Form Interrogatory 17.1
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Quinton B. Cutlip, Esq. CUTLIP LAW OFFICE, PC (415) 265-7785 cutliplawoffice@gmail.com
Attorney for Plaintiff MARY RILEY
Andrew K. Murphy, Esq., CLAPP, MORONEY, VUCINICH, BEEMAN+SCHELEY (925) 734-0990 amurphy@clappmoroney.com Attorney for Defendant VANESSA LOUISE GETTY (Via ZOOM)

Defendant contest the amount of sanctions ordered. Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARY RILEY'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admissions And The Corresponding Form Interrogatory 17.1.

Plaintiff Mary Riley moves to compel defendant Vanessa Getty to make further responses to her requests for admission, nos. 3-5, 9-11, 13, and 14, and to form interrogatory 17.1. Riley also seeks sanctions. The motion is granted in part.

(see word minutes for complete ruling)

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2025 Set For Trial On Jul-20-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
